candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Could be a cash component, but the cleaner total cash line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash matches balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet cash line over cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Exact total for short-term debt and current portion of long-term debt; excludes need to sum components and is preferable to component rows.
Component of current debt, but likely incomplete versus the explicit total short-term debt/current portion line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the debt amount.

variables.notes: Used the explicit total current debt line. Did not include lease liability rows or 'Current maturities' to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct IFRS-style current tax liability label.

candidates.why: Exact match for total property, plant and equipment; preferred net PPE line.
Gross PPE line exists conceptually, but total reported PPE line is cleaner and preferred.
Only a component of PPE, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected total/net PPE line as preferred.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities
candidates.why: This is the standard net operating cash flow line and is more precise for OANCF than pre-working-capital or gross operating cash lines.
Operating cash-related subtotal, but typically before some items; less preferred than the net operating cash flow line.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities

variables.notes: Chose net cash flow from operating activities from the cash flow statement, outside the shortlist but clearly the best semantic match.
